text:
✅ Build PASSED | Tests: 10/10 new tests passing | TypeScript: clean | Commit: d6bc66c

Summary:
• POST /generate endpoint added to poster-generator/api/main.py
• Returns 202 with job_id immediately (async, non-blocking)
• Job status file created at poster-generator/api/jobs/{job_id}.json
• Background task runs python generate_etsy_bundle.py with city/country/theme
• Theme validation: midnight_blue, vintage, sepia, watercolor, dark
• Missing/invalid fields return 422 (FastAPI validation)
• Health check /health still works correctly
